result.headline: AU legal market sweep — NZ-qualified, ~3 PQE

sections.title: Shortlist totals
entries: Probably not viable without current AU admission

sections.title: Where to focus first
sections.body: Sydney, Melbourne, Canberra, Brisbane, and Perth across disputes/litigation, commercial, family, public law, and junior in-house roles. Prioritise listings that are silent on admission but a strong 2–4 PQE fit. Deprioritise roles that expressly require current Australian admission or a practising certificate.

sections.title: Practical filters used
entries: Only public pages — recruiters, AU job boards, direct firm/in-house careers
Bucketed by AU-admission status so the distinction is visible
8+ representative evidence tabs spread across cities & practice areas
